channel.title: AI on ҜŁΔΜΔŦĦ Ŧ€ĆĦ ĆØŁŁ€ĆŦƗV€
channel.description: Recent content in AI on ҜŁΔΜΔŦĦ Ŧ€ĆĦ ĆØŁŁ€ĆŦƗV€

item.title: AI Reality Check: Staying Grounded in the Age of Machine Hype
item.author: contact@klamathtech.diy (ҜŁΔΜΔŦĦ Ŧ€ĆĦ ĆØŁŁ€ĆŦƗV€)

item.title: Questions of Animism, AI, and Consciousness
item.author: contact@klamathtech.diy (ҜŁΔΜΔŦĦ Ŧ€ĆĦ ĆØŁŁ€ĆŦƗV€)

item.title: The Reverse Centaur: Who Does Technology Work For?
item.author: contact@klamathtech.diy (ҜŁΔΜΔŦĦ Ŧ€ĆĦ ĆØŁŁ€ĆŦƗV€)

item.title: AI: Real Problems Index
item.author: contact@klamathtech.diy (ҜŁΔΜΔŦĦ Ŧ€ĆĦ ĆØŁŁ€ĆŦƗV€)
item.description: A running index of documented real-world harms from AI systems — not speculation about future risks, but concrete cases of bias, discrimination, misinformation, environmental damage, labor exploitation, and rights violations happening now. A useful counter to the hype cycle.

item.title: Claude Code Prompt Steganography
item.author: contact@klamathtech.diy (ҜŁΔΜΔŦĦ Ŧ€ĆĦ ĆØŁŁ€ĆŦƗV€)
item.description: Security research examining how hidden instructions can be embedded in AI coding assistant prompts — content invisible to users but readable by the model. Raises important questions about transparency and trust when AI tools operate on your codebase without full visibility into what they’ve been instructed to do.
